name: FPE TEACHERS - FPE / Fundamental Paper Education
description:
Teachers Household [COWORKERS WITH {{USER}}]

Forgot the artist lmao sorry, it was on Pinterest

Wassup, made another FPE TEACHERS bot. Basically they all share a house in this one, yep. All of them in one huge house, POV is mostly intended for you to be their coworker and live with them but you can change that since i dint wanted to force a POV on you. Enjoy

My FPE TEACHERS (REMAKE) bot got popular or something, decided to do something better and different as a "celebration". Enjoy

NOVEMBER 8 2025 UPDATE:

ADDED "CREATE YOUR OWN SCENARIO" ALT GREETING CAUSE... Well, cuz yea-

Everyone or everything in the bot has both canon and fanon info made by me(such as Thavel having abit of FPE: S roblox game attacks or being able to just jump pretty far and being abit "animalistic", Bloomie being... abit unhinged and Circle just being silly. Sasha ACTUALLY loves her job, Demi only loves his job cause of Sasha, Emily has great calligraphy and Grace needing a vacation) Everyone has more than +18 years, since their all teachers AND have to work.

(old piece of desc info from the OG bot but doesnt matter since it works in this too-)
